name: Hot & Cold Salad Sampler
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Place potatoes on a baking sheet and bake until lightly browned and crisp, about 20-25 minutes, following package directions.
3. In a small bowl, mix sour cream and dressing thoroughly; set aside.
4. Line four serving plates with lettuce leaves.
5. Arrange beef, tomatoes, cucumber, onion, and artichokes on lettuce in an even distribution.
6. Add the hot potatoes to each plate just before serving.
7. Serve with a small dish of sour cream mixture for dipping and dressing.
Menu: Tomato Soup, Instant Vanilla Pudding with Toasted Sliced Almonds
Nutritional Information Per Serving: 490 calories; 19 g fat; 90 mg cholesterol; 330 mg sodium; 45 g carbohydrate; 7 g fiber; 34 g protein.
